tasks.title: Split internal/store/store_retention_test.go (901 LOC) into focused test files
plan: Group retention tests by feature (jobs, crawl states, artifacts) and split into multiple *_test.go files.
Extract shared helpers into a testutil file if needed.
notes: Why it matters: oversized test files are difficult to maintain and make failures harder to triage.
Minimal fix: split by responsibility while keeping assertions intact.

tasks.title: Split internal/webhook/dispatcher_test.go (803 LOC) into focused test files
plan: Separate dispatcher tests by scenario (success, retries, failures, rate limits) into multiple files.
Keep shared fixtures in a local test helper file.
notes: Why it matters: large test files increase cognitive load and complicate adding coverage.
Minimal fix: split tests into cohesive files without altering behavior.
